title_en: Embodied world-model survey consolidates the field
title_zh: 具身世界模型综述让该方向进一步收敛
description_en: A survey helps new readers see the common structure across embodied world-model work.
description_zh: 综述帮助新读者看到具身世界模型工作的共通结构。
why_it_matters: A sign that the embodied branch has become large enough to need structured synthesis.
